title: Image Resolution (0x9A)
description: Image resolution triplet layout. (Do not include triplet length or TID here.)

elements.name: XBase
elements.description: Unit base for image resolution in the X direction

elements.name: YBase
elements.description: Unit base for image resolution in the Y direction

elements.name: XResol
elements.description: Number of image points in X direction per X unit base (1-32767)

elements.name: YResol
elements.description: Number of image points in Y direction per Y unit base (1-32767)
